response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE development — key requirements for the role. Their background is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only incidental Java exposure in past roles without evidence of deep JVM or IDE internals expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer education
Experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and infrastructure automation
concerns: No evidence of professional work on Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or JVM internals
Minimal to no exposure to Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or application server integration
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) misaligns with core Java/Kotlin focus
